title: Lead Revenue Manager at Elior India

jsonLd.title: Lead Revenue Manager at Elior India
jsonLd.description:
Elior India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Revenue Manager to join our dynamic team in Mysuru. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Elior India:
Elior India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Elior India!
